name: ai-travel-agent
description: Agentic AI travel agent — Claude orchestrates flights, stays, cars, and activities in parallel.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.install:all: npm i && cd client && npm i && cd ../server && npm i
scripts.playwright:install: cd server && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd server && npm run lint" "cd client && npm run lint"
